title: Live Streaming Indosiar Trending with Persebaya Updates
description: Recent reports highlight Persebaya Youthcon 2026, an anniversary game, and player memories, according to sources like Persebaya.id and Kompas.com.

sources.title: Persebaya Youthcon 2026 Tuntas Digelar, Ratusan Talenta Muda Bersinar
Rachmat Irianto Kenang Andi Peci, Luruskan Pula Asal-usul Nama "Irianto"

sections.heading: Persebaya Youthcon 2026
paragraphs: According to Persebaya.id, the Persebaya Youthcon 2026 was successfully held. The source reports that hundreds of young talents shone during the event.

sections.heading: Anniversary Game Coverage
paragraphs: ANTARA Foto provided coverage of the Anniversary Game 99 Persebaya. This event is highlighted in the context of the club's activities.

sections.heading: Player Statements
paragraphs: Kompas.com reported on comments made by Rachmat Irianto. According to the article, he remembered Andi Peci and clarified the origin of the name 'Irianto'.

faq.q: What did Persebaya.id report about the Youthcon 2026?
faq.a: Persebaya.id stated that the Persebaya Youthcon 2026 was successfully held and noted that hundreds of young talents shone.

faq.q: What is the focus of the Kompas.com article?
faq.a: According to Kompas.com, the article focuses on Rachmat Irianto remembering Andi Peci and clarifying the origin of the name 'Irianto'.
